title: Xtra Flaky British Lentil Pasties
description: A traditional British dish featuring roasted lentils in a flaky pastry crust, perfect for a hangover cure. This recipe incorporates poached ingredients and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly elements.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the lentils, onion, carrots, and potatoes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the vegetable oil, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the oil mixture over the lentil mixture and stir until everything is well combined.
Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Spoon the lentil mixture onto one half of the pastry dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry dough over the filling and press the edges to seal.
Use a fork to crimp the edges and create a decorative border.
Brush the top of the pasty with a little bit of vegetable oil.
Place the pasty on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 40 minutes.
